name: Gimmick Puppet Chimera Doll
name_jp: ギミック・パペット－キメラ・ドール
desc:
2 Machine monsters
During your Main Phase, if you control this Link Summoned card: You can activate this effect; you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except Machine Xyz Monsters, also take 1 "Gimmick Puppet" monster from your Deck, and either add it to your hand or send it to the GY, then, if all monsters you control are "Gimmick Puppet" monsters (min. 1), you can Special Summon 1 "Gimmick Puppet" monster from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Gimmick Puppet Chimera Doll" once per turn.

You can only use this effect of "Gimmick Puppet Chimera Doll" once per turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
